If you want to really take advantage of the biggest savings to score a home backup companion, you’ll get a new low price going with Jackery’s 5,040Wh Explorer 5000 Plus Portable Power Station with two 500W solar panels and a Smart Transfer Switch for $4,499.10 shipped (or check out the bigger bundles below), beating Amazon’s pricing by $800. While it may carry a $6,499 MSRP direct from Jackery, we only ever saw it climb to that rate earlier in 2026, with things usually starting around $5,889 recently, and discounts only going as low as $4,549 back during Black Friday. Now, during this sale, you’ll be getting a larger-than-ever $2,000 markdown with the bonus savings factored in, giving you an all-new all-time low price. Head below to browse the full lineup of deals.

We just spotted a deal at Amazon that drops ASUS’ latest ROG Falchion Ace 75 Hall effect keyboard in white down to $159.99 shipped. This is one of the newer Hall effect models that hit the scene earlier this carrying a $220 price tag. It has only been discounted a couple of times since its debut and it has never dropped below the $180 mark. Today’s 27% discount takes $60 off its usual going rate to land it $27 below its previous all-time low. This is the lowest price we have tracked for this keyboard, so be sure to grab it after getting more details below.

more…

items.title: Lenovo’s 2026 Yoga Slim 7x Snapdragon X2 Elite OLED Copilot+ PCs are up to $427 off today (All-time low)
items.summary:
As part of its now live Graduation sale, Lenovo is offering one of its latest Yoga Slim 7x Copilot+ PCs for $1,349.99 shipped with promo code USGRADYOGA2 that auto-applies during checkout. That’s a straight-up $350 discount on its $,1700 usual going rate. This is a fairly new laptop that hit the scene earlier this year at CES as one of the first models to debut with Qualcomm’s latest Snapdragon X2 Elite processor. Today’s offer lands as the first deal we’ve tracked for this new notebook, and it marks a new best price to beat at 20% off. Another variant of this laptop with a 2.8K OLED and an 18-core X2 Elite processor can also be had for $1,472.49 shipped with promo code EXTRAFIVE. This is also the lowest price we have tracked for this variant, and it’s down from its usual price of $1,900. Head below for more details.

more…

items.title: Get adaptability on a budget with Worx’s 40V 17-inch cordless electric Intellicut mower + 2x batteries at a $250 2026 low
items.summary:
Amazon is currently offering the best price of 2026 on the Worx 40V 17-inch 2-in-1 Cordless Electric Intellicut Lawn Mower with 2x 4.0Ah batteries down at $249.99 shipped. Normally going as high as $380 when at full price, It’s spent a lot of time in 2026 down at $280, with occasional discounts lower to $250. Aside from the one-time $240 low from July’s Prime Day event last year, you’re otherwise getting the best tracked price on this bundle for $130 savings. You can find some additional Worx tool deals in the official Amazon storefront here.

items.title: Get up to 14.5-feet of reach with Greenworks’ 80V 10-inch cordless electric polesaw for $200 (Best in over a year)
items.summary:
Amazon is currently offering the Greenworks 80V 10-inch Cordless Electric Polesaw with 2.0Ah battery for $199.99 shipped, matching the price we’re seeing direct from the brand’s website. It carries a $320 MSRP direct from Greenworks, but starts a little lower at $300 at Amazon, with discounts in 2026 having previously taken things as low as $241. Now, with the deal here, you’re getting a larger $100 markdown off the going rate, landing it at the best price we have tracked in over a year – just $9 above the all-time lowest price. You can shop Greenworks’ other tool deals in the official Amazon storefront here.

more…

items.title: I use these Matter smart bulbs in my Apple Home and right now you can grab six for only $5 each
items.summary:
Linkind Matter Smart Light Bulbs (6-pack)

Buy for $30 (Reg. $43)

What we love

Back when smart bulbs were first becoming a thing, it was common to spend $20 or more per bulb. Fast forward to today and now we have affordable solutions like this that when on sale only cost $5 each. Best of all, these don’t require a hub and are Matter certified so they will work with all major smart home ecosystems.

items.title: Recycle like a boss with Fanttik’s USB-C rechargeable cardboard cutter down at $70 (Reg. $90)
items.summary:
Fanttik C10 Pro USB-C Rechargeable Cardboard Cutter

Buy for $70 (Reg. $90)

What we love

Where I live, our recycling is hauled away once a month. If we just throw boxes in there, we will never make it a full month. That’s we we tear them down, and it’s not exactly a fun endeavor. That’s why I’ve been strongly considering a cardboard cutter like this so the ordeal is well, less of an ordeal.

Elevation Lab TimeCapsule 10-Year AirTag Battery Case (4-pack)

Buy for $38 (Reg. $45)

Clip the on-page $5 off coupon.

What we love

While an AirTag will last about a year in your bag or wherever you decide to put it, what if you could leave it there for a decade instead? That feels sort of unreal to me, but totally doable with Elevation Lab’s TimeCapsule device here. This offer delivers four of them for $9.50 each.
